component.name: RunManager
component.selected: Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: -runTests -batchmode -projectPath "C:\Users\omrit\Documents\GitHub\Unity Final Project No LFS" -testResults Logs/results.xml -logFile Logs/Editor.log -testPlatform EditMode -debugCodeOptimization
